name: Trello — List Cards
description: Lists cards from a Trello board

script.value:
import os, json
from trello import TrelloClient

key = os.environ.get('TRELLO_KEY', '')
token = os.environ.get('TRELLO_TOKEN', '')
board_name = os.environ.get('BOARD', '')

client = TrelloClient(api_key=key, token=token)
board = next((b for b in client.list_boards() if b.name == board_name), None)

if not board:
    print(json.dumps({'error': f'Board {board_name} not found'}))
    raise SystemExit(1)

cards = []
for lst in board.list_lists():
    for card in lst.list_cards():
        cards.append({'id': card.id, 'name': card.name, 'list': lst.name, 'url': card.url})

print(json.dumps({'board': board_name, 'count': len(cards), 'cards': cards}))
